/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++23 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/neuron.cpp.o CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/neural_net.cpp.o CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/backpropagation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/utils/multiplyMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/an_nn.dir/src/utils/matrixToVector.cpp.o -o an_nn
